title: Exchange List Partition add validition check  tests for null value handling and default partition
description:
Please create a followup issue, to test null handling in validation, since I assume there may be hidded issues in non-list cases?

_Originally posted by @mjonss in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/46021#pullrequestreview-1636530327_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT DEFAULT NULL, c VARCHAR(128)) PARTITION BY HASH (id) PARTITIONS 3;
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT DEFAULT NULL, c VARCHAR(128), d DATE DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, c, d) VALUES (1, 'test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE id IS NULL;
key_bug_features: null handling in validation for partitioned tables
